original_title: WANZ-193 Muchimuchi Temptation Panchira Cousin, I'm having trouble with my eyes ... Yui Oba - Oba Yui
overview: During my job hunting in Tokyo, I decided to rent my vacant room to Yui, who is by far the cutest of my cousins. Yui-chan, who has become a sexy woman who does not seem to be younger, always flickers defenselessly. Are you not looking at me as a man, or are you tempting me ... I'm still worried about it ... I'm on the verge of an outburst!
